tagline: One economy across all your Discord servers
one_sentence_purpose: A C# Discord bot that provides a single shared cross-server economy with currency, ranks, trading, and moderation tools
target_users: Discord server administrators who want a unified economy system spanning multiple communities
visual_metaphors: gold coins connected by network lines spanning multiple server icons
a globe (atlas) with currency symbols orbiting it
interconnected hexagonal nodes representing linked servers with a central treasury
